name: Procholito
overview: The stories of 'Procholito' are often heard while walking, sometimes read, and deeply embedded in the minds since childhood. 'Procholito' reflects the art of enveloping these ideas in the contemporary cloak, creating a timeless allure.

trailers.title: Procholito | Official Trailer | Chorki Original Series | Sadia | Yash | Baizid | Sentu | Monwar
